---
title: "Haley McCann"
---

<div style="text-align: center;">
<img src="Photo.jpg" alt="Photo of Haley McCann" class="profile-pic"/>

# Haley McCann

Hi! I'm Haley, a student interested in technology, data science,
and creative digital projects. This website showcases my work.
</div>

## Portfolio

Check out some of my class projects below:

- [RAG FOMC Project](RAG_FOMC_2_20_26.html)
